onboarding.structure: Bento grid (Mode A) to choose profiles (Student, Freelancer, Creator).
onboarding.spacing: Generous gaps (gap-8), massive padding (p-12) for containers.
onboarding.background: Minimalist blur overlay on login, solid color step-through.

dashboard_global.structure: Control Room grid (Mode B). Left collapsible sidebar (240px wide). Main content area with a max-width wrapper (max-w-7xl mx-auto).
dashboard_global.card_style: Cardless where possible. Flat rectangles with 1px border-border, rounded-lg. Deep padding (p-6 or p-8).
dashboard_global.calendar_view: Dense table grid. High contrast focus on 'Today' column. Small, legible typography.

student.vibe: Focused, calm, structured. Green accents for completion and study blocks.

freelancer.vibe: Professional, time-sensitive. Blue accents for active states and tracking.

creator.vibe: Energetic, visual. Amber accents for scheduling and inspiration.

component_styling_tokens.buttons: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-md). solid bg-primary text-primary-foreground. Hover: slight opacity dip (opacity-90).
component_styling_tokens.inputs: Shadcn-based. Very subtle filled background (bg-transparent), solid bottom border. Focus: thin 1px ring.
component_styling_tokens.modals: Glassmorphism overlays (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60). Dialog body is solid surface color, rounded-lg, p-8.
component_styling_tokens.tabs: Segmented control. Minimal pill shapes. Active state has solid surface background and sharp shadow.
component_styling_tokens.badges: Pill shape (rounded-full), monochrome or profile-specific accent with 10% opacity background and solid text.

motion_and_microinteractions.page_load: Staggered fade-in (100ms delay between elements). No bouncy spring animations. Linear and fast (150ms ease-out).
motion_and_microinteractions.toast: Slide in from bottom-right. Snappy entrance.

icons.style: size-4 or size-5. strokeWidth 1.5 for a clean, sharp look.

login_bg.description: Abstract sunlight streaming across a minimalist desk. Used as a faint background image behind the login/onboarding container with heavy opacity overlay.

technical_rules.components: Use custom React components for layouts. heavily customize Shadcn UI for dropdowns, selects, and dialogs.
technical_rules.file_extension: MUST use .js and .jsx for components (no TSX).
technical_rules.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-button', data-testid='task-item').
technical_rules.db: Firestore for storing user profiles and tasks. Ensure user_id is linked to all documents.
